message:
fix: auto-correct when LLM calls agent names directly as tools

LLMs sometimes call agent names (e.g. "command-runner") directly
as tool names instead of using delegate(agent_name=..., goal=...).
parsePlanResponse now accepts a set of known agent names and
auto-converts these to proper delegations when a goal-like
argument is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
